content.en:
The Great Universe, the Yang Heaven Temple.

At this moment, the expressions of the three True Monarchs of the Yang Heavenly Hall changed greatly, looking at the group of True Monarchs and a large number of Heavenly Monarchs outside the Great Array of the Town Palace.

"What do you mean, guys?"

Yanglong Zhenjun asked.

The people besieging the Yang Heaven Temple were none other than the powerhouses of the Immortal Sect, one of the top powers.

The Immortal Gate is not a great force that is weaker than the Void Heaven Palace, and it has dozens of True Monarchs, while the Yang Heaven Temple is relatively weak, there are only three True Monarchs, and in addition to the Yang Dragon True Monarch, the other two True Monarchs are weak chickens, which are useless at all, and they are not even as good as the top half-step True Spirit powerhouses of the Immortal Gate.

Because of the Yanglong True Monarch, the Yangtian Palace occupies a very large territory, and the Yangtian Temple is not very far from the territory of the Immortal Gate, so the Immortal Gate has a fancy to the territory of the Yangtian Palace.

The most important thing is that the backing of the Yangtian Temple is too weak, there is no Dao Ancestor, not even a top-level True Ancestor, just a moderately weak True Ancestor.

Such a force is not qualified to build a true kingdom at all, and has no choice but to be annexed.

"Surrender to the Immortal Gate, and spare your lives!"

Zhenlong Zhenjun of the Immortal Gate said coldly.

"Zhenlong True Monarch, if the Immortal Sect dares to destroy us, aren't you afraid of offending the Yang Tian True Ancestor? Yang Tian True Ancestor may be far inferior to the Immortal Sect, but it's not something you can offend!"

Yang Long True Monarch tried to move out of Yang Tian True Ancestor in order to save Yang Tian Temple's current predicament.

Although he took refuge in Ye Tian, he was now the person in charge of the Yangtian Temple in the Great Universe after all, and he still had a lot of feelings for the Yangtian Palace, so he naturally didn't want the Yangtian Temple to be destroyed.

"Hahaha, Yang Tian True Ancestor, that waste material True Ancestor, we don't know how many such True Ancestors there are in our Immortal Sect, our Immortal Sect can send a powerful True Ancestor casually, you can destroy your Yang Heaven Temple in the chaos, and use Yang Tian True Ancestor to threaten me, it's just looking for death!"

Zhenlong Zhenjun said in annoyance.

"Attack!"

He no longer gave the Yangtian Temple a chance, and was ready to directly destroy the Yangtian Palace, and then send people to occupy the territory of the Yangtian Palace.

Bang!!!!

Rounds of attacks fell, and the Great Array of the Yang Heaven Hall quickly cracked.

At this time, the other two True Monarchs of the Yang Heavenly Palace, as well as many Heavenly Monarchs, were all terrified, and some even began to beg for mercy.

"Yanglong Zhenjun, it's all your fault, if you surrendered earlier, we wouldn't have died!"

Poyu True Monarch, one of the three true monarchs of the Yang Heaven Palace, pointed at the Yang Dragon True Monarch and scolded.

The others also blamed Yang Long Zhenjun, blaming Yang Long Zhenjun for cutting off their last chance, and now the Immortal Gate doesn't give them a chance to live at all, no matter how useless they beg for mercy.

"You ......"

Yang Long Zhenjun was very disappointed in the people of Yang Tian Temple, this group of people was so spineless, and they didn't dare to resist, but blamed him for everything.

"Maybe I should have left the Yangtian Temple earlier, but I don't know if the master can come in time!"

Yanglong Zhenjun muttered inwardly.

He had already sent the message to the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, but if Ye Tian was in deep retreat, he might not be able to receive the information in time, and the Immortal Gate was already about to break the Great Array.

Once the formation is broken, the current situation of the Yang Heavenly Temple will not be able to resist at all, and it will be destroyed in an instant.

Click!

The great array was about to shatter completely, and the aura of despair permeated the Yangtian Temple.

With the laughter of everyone in the Immortal Sect, the great array of the Yangtian Temple was completely shattered, and the Heavenly Monarch and True Monarch of the Yangtian Temple were completely exposed in front of the powerhouses of the Immortal Sect.

"Kill them!"

Zhenlong Zhenjun ordered.

Bang!!!!

The terrifying attack bombarded down, and endless light covered everything in the Yang Heaven Temple.

At this time, Yanglong Zhenjun gave up resisting, the whole person closed his eyes, and his divine sense shrank into the soul sea, no longer having a trace of resistance, only preparing to meet the arrival of death.

Ahh!!hhhh

The many Heavenly Monarchs of the Yang Heaven Temple, as well as the half-step True Spirits and True Monarchs, were melted away one by one, and they were unable to resist the attack of the Immortal Gate at all.

But Yang Long Zhenjun found that he was not dead, and he didn't even feel it at all.

So, he opened his eyes, and his consciousness stretched out.

"At this time......"

Yanglong Zhenjun was shocked.

The rest of the Yang Heaven Temple was almost dead, and he was the only one left.

The reason why he didn't die was not because the people of the Immortal Gate let him go, but because someone stood in front of him and protected him.

"Master!"

Yanglong Zhenjun bowed respectfully.

Standing in front of him was his master, Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ziye Tian!

"Stand down!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Yes!"

Yanglong Zhenjun nodded.

The people of the Immortal Gate stopped attacking, and Zhenlong Zhenjun also stared at Ye Tian with a solemn face, and asked, "Wanfa Daozi, I don't know what you are doing here?"

Ye Tian put his hands behind his back, with an unfathomable look, and said, "Yangtian Palace, I have saved it!"

"Wanfa Daozi, what do you mean by this? Your Void Heaven Temple is far away from here, don't you still want to cross the region to occupy here, what good is this way? In the future, it is impossible for the True Kingdom of the Void Heaven Temple to enclose this area, and it is too unreasonable for the Void Heaven Hall to forcibly occupy this place!"

If it were someone else, Zhenlong Zhenjun would have done it without saying a word, but standing in front of him was the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, and the legend has it that one person almost destroyed the ruthless people of the Demon Yin Sect.

If it weren't for the appearance of the Dao Ancestor of the Demon Sound Sect, the Demon Sound Sect of the Great Universe would probably be gone long ago.

Although the Immortal Sect now also has hole cards, and even feels that there is hope to kill Ye Tian, it does not dare to really use the power of the sect to kill Ye Tian.

And these people he brought with him definitely couldn't beat Ye Tian, and maybe no one would even be able to escape.

So, he had to endure.

"Yangtian Temple has been a secret subordinate force of our Void Heaven Temple for a long time, and Yanglong True Monarch is one of my subordinates, this place should have belonged to the Void Heaven Palace, is it possible that I can't protect my territory?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"This ......"

Zhenlong Zhenjun hesitated.

Just now, Yanglong Zhenjun called Ye Tian the master, obviously he was really Ye Tian's subordinate.

But Yangtian Hall is definitely not Ye Tian's power, otherwise as long as the other people in Yangtian Hall move out of Ye Tian, they won't dare to kill them, and Ye Tian didn't protect the others.

But now, those people are dead, and there is no proof of death!

"If you don't retreat, then don't go!"

Ye Tian's murderous aura was pervasive, and the terrifying aura seemed to freeze this piece of time and space.

"Let's go!"

Zhenlong Zhenjun was shocked, and hurriedly retreated with the rest of the Immortal Gate, otherwise if he didn't retreat, he would really not be able to leave.

Whew!

In an instant, the people of the Immortal Gate retreated.

"Yang Long, gather your loyal subordinates as soon as possible and prepare to leave the Yang Heavenly Palace. As for this territory, I really can't keep it all the time, I will find a way to trade with a big force in exchange for a small territory close to the territory near the Void Heaven Temple. In this way, even if there will be losses, it will not be too great!" Ye Tian advised.

"Yes, master!"

Yanglong Zhenjun nodded.
